name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 22 Jan 2020
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version: ","bold":true},{"text":"v6.86"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"Minor Changes"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Update the Kings Transport manifest submission to use SFTP rather than FTP."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Improved the "}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"[@articles_items@]"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":" B@SE tag to use the sort by weight function."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where OpenFreight labels didn't display the signature required correctly."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where the minimum weight in shipping rates wasn't enforcing the shipping cost."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with the UpdateOrder API call where it wasn't adding tracking details to split kits."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in the Amazon integration where quantity wasn't sent if the Fulfilment centre ID was mapped to an empty field."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in Neto Inventory where the supplier item code was missing from purchase orders."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
